examples.label: Double pendulum (3D, MSL)
examples.figures: Figure(title="Double pendulum", plots={Plot(title="Joint angular velocity", curves={Curve(y=revolute1.w, legend="revolute1.w"), Curve(y=revolute2.w, legend="revolute2.w")})}, caption="Angular velocity of the two revolute joints over time. The 3D view above shows the motion; the plot reads off the joint speeds the animation cannot convey.")

examples.label: Robot R3 (3D CAD, MSL)
examples.figures: Figure(title="Robot R3", plots={Plot(title="Joint angles", curves={Curve(y=axis1.axisControlBus.angle, legend="axis 1"), Curve(y=axis2.axisControlBus.angle, legend="axis 2"), Curve(y=axis3.axisControlBus.angle, legend="axis 3"), Curve(y=axis4.axisControlBus.angle, legend="axis 4"), Curve(y=axis5.axisControlBus.angle, legend="axis 5"), Curve(y=axis6.axisControlBus.angle, legend="axis 6")})}, caption="Load-side angle of each of the six joints as the path-planning drives the robot from its start to its end configuration.")
